html:
Exclusive to:

“Restores 3.9 Hunger every 5 seconds.”

-

The Milkmade Hat is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is obtained by cooking 1 Naked Nostrils, 1 raw Kelp Fronds, 1 Dairy, and any filler (Twigs, Eggs, Carrots, etc).

It restores 3.9 Hunger every 5 seconds for a total of 187.5 over 4 minutes, and will only perish while equipped. If equipped before sleeping, it can extend the total time one can spend asleep. Spore bombs thrown by Toadstool can reduce its perish time.

Being neither meat nor goodies, Wigfrid will refuse to equip and be fed by it. Despite being a hat, it still counts as food. As such, Wortox will still only benefit 50% from it.

Recipe

Example

Trivia

  • The Milkmade Hat was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.

Gallery

  • Milkmade Hat Equipped

–Wilson

–Willow

–Wigfrid
“Mother said we must always drink our milk.”
–Webber
“Quelle horreur! What a waste of good food!”
–Warly
“Food? No. Hat?”
–Wormwood
“Pretty practical if you ask me.”
–Winona
“What will the mortals cook up next.”
–Wortox
“Weird hat.”
–Wurt
“Milk is good for your skeleton!”
–Walter
“What a wonderful, time-saving design!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Milkmade là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó thu được bằng cách nấu 1 Lỗ mũi trần, 1 Lá tảo bẹ sống, 1 Sữa và bất kỳ chất độn nào (Cành cây, Trứng, Cà rốt, v.v.).
